variables.name: vpc_id
variables.description: ID of the VPC in which to create the security group.

variables.name: name_prefix
variables.description: Prefix for the security group name and tags.

variables.name: allowed_ssh_cidrs
variables.description: Comma-separated CIDR blocks allowed SSH (port 22) access. Use your IP for security.

variables.name: environment
variables.description: Deployment environment tag (e.g. dev, staging, prod).
